description: §18.0.1 — a block `<match for=Phase on=@phase>` with an explicit `on=` scrutinee SHALL NOT fire E-MATCH-ON-REQUIRED. Acceptance sibling of e-match-on-required-pos: the explicit scrutinee satisfies the requirement, so the auto-implied-resolution check stays silent.
rationale: §18.0.1: when `on=expr` is present the `<match>` has an explicit subject and no auto-implied engine resolution is needed, so E-MATCH-ON-REQUIRED is correctly silent.
